sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68093" key="misopw/gwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῑσο-πώγων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n68093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beard-hater</tr_>, i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hater of bearded philosophers</tr_>, name of a satire by the emperor Julian.</sense> </entryFree>
